arts.ttl: Eddie Howe has new NUFC undroppable - and he wasn't even in the team last season
arts.sum: "For me, he's our player of the season so far - I woiuld say between him, Lewis Hall and Alexander Isak as well." That was Bruno Guimaraes revealing how much he values Dan Burn's contribution to this Newcastle United side earlier this month, and the Brazilian is not wrong when it comes to the big defender. Howe alternated between Hall and new signing Lloyd Kelly in the opening matches of the season, but once he was introduced as a half-time substitute against Fulham in September, he has never looked back.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's AC Milan signing bumped up pecking order as new arrival welcomed
arts.sum: Newcastle are hoping to avoided serious injuries to both Burn and Botman, with the former limping out of Saturday's win over Birmingham and the latter not being risked for the FA Cup clash - but should the senior duo miss out, an opportunity may present itself to under-21 talent Cathal Heffernan. Heffernan is one of a few young, Irish talents purchased by Newcastle in recent seasons.

arts.ttl: Newcastle's new right winger speaks out after turning down 'other big clubs'
arts.sum: Steve Harper and Paul Midgley [head of youth recruitment] showed me the pathway of players such as Alex Murphy, who came through Galway's academy and then signed for Newcastle like myself. Kyle Fitzgerald has admitted it was a 'no-brainer' to join Newcastle United after the in-demand winger turned down 'other big clubs'.
